diagrams.title: Complexity Growth Chart
diagrams.description: A graph showing different time complexity functions plotted against input size n
elements: Curves: O(1), O(log n), O(n), O(n log n), O(n²), O(n³), O(2ⁿ)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize and compare how different complexity classes grow as input size increases

diagrams.title: Big-O, Omega, Theta Bounds
diagrams.description: Three graphs showing how a function f(n) relates to g(n) in each notation
elements: Tight bound (Θ): f(n) sandwiched between c1·g(n) and c2·g(n)
diagrams.purpose: Understand the visual interpretation of asymptotic bounds

diagrams.title: Recursion Tree for Merge Sort
diagrams.description: Tree diagram showing how Merge Sort divides and merges
elements: Merge cost n at each level
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the recurrence T(n)=2T(n/2)+n leading to O(n log n)

diagrams.title: Nested Loop Complexity
diagrams.description: Visual representation of loop structures and their complexities
elements: Doubling loop: O(log n) - binary tree depth
diagrams.purpose: Understand how loop structures determine time complexity
